completedWorkOrders.summary: Protected workspace header and posture chips no longer show internal build-language phrases.
Site Dashboard No Mentor metric opens Mentor Assignments with noMentor=true and status=unassigned.
Expanded the hourly functionality UX prompt into a ladder-driven growth system with durable ledger/state tracking and prompt-quality verification.

Completed the one-time product readiness sprint: language cleanup, admin site selector, collapsible navigation, wider dashboard layout, dashboard click-through presets, top-risk student detail actions, 100-item audit, ledger, and state handoff.
Product/platform, org, and site admins now see a real current-site selector when multiple accessible sites exist, or an honest current-site indicator when only one site is available.
Site Dashboard Submitted and Needs Revision metrics open the Review Queue filters, and Presentation and Archive metrics open Operations readiness filters.
Top-risk dashboard rows now open the existing authorized student detail panel through the scoped detail loader.

Added npm run verify:dashboard-actions to block dead protected workspace links, unsupported dashboard presets, unbacked review/operations filters, student-detail bypasses, read-only boundary drift, and fake placeholder action text.
Site Dashboard Program Breakdown rows now open Student Directory with the existing scoped programId filter.
Site Dashboard Mentor Coverage rows now open Mentor Assignments with the existing scoped mentorUserId filter.
Student home now elevates one own-student next action from existing nextSteps or summary counts before the longer task list.
Review Queue now supports safe URL-state deep links for real scoped filters, URL sync on filter changes, clear-filter query cleanup, and back/forward restoration.
Review Queue, Student Directory, Mentor Assignments, and Operations now show active filter summaries with clear-filter actions and clearer no-results guidance.
Added npm run verify:review-queue-deeplinks to guard supported query params, canonicalization, history sync, clear filters, and URL tests.
Added npm run verify:workspace-navigation to guard known workspace sections, route-backed dashboard presets, read-only boundaries, and active-filter UI.
Student Directory now restores and syncs safe shareable URL state for existing scoped filters, clear filters, pagination, and dashboard program drill-downs.
Mentor Assignments now restores and syncs safe shareable URL state for existing scoped filters, no-mentor and mentor-workload drill-downs, clear filters, and pagination.
Operations readiness now restores and syncs safe shareable URL state, exposes the existing submission-status filter, and preserves read-only behavior.
Workspace URL/history tests and dashboard/navigation verifiers now guard shareable worklist URLs, stale-param cleanup, URL-synced dashboard presets, and site-switch filter cleanup.
Authorized student detail summaries now surface the latest visible review/comment context already returned by the scoped detail API, with render test coverage.

Admin workspace hamburger close now hides the full navigation and frees content width; Students and No Mentor dashboard counts open the Student Directory, with No Mentor and Mentor Coverage using the supported noMentor=true filter.
Site Dashboard Status Breakdown rows now open the scoped Student Directory with the supported status filter and shareable URL state; unsupported statuses remain summary-only.
Program Teacher dashboard scoped-student rows now expose a real View detail action using the existing site student detail handler and scoped detail route.
Operations worklist student-detail actions now keep and close back to the Operations source context instead of jumping to the Student Directory.
Mentor Dashboard assigned-student rows now open the existing authorized student detail drawer and close back to Mentor Dashboard.
Review Queue student-detail actions now open the existing authorized student detail drawer and close back to Review Queue.
Program Teacher Dashboard and Mentor Assignments student-detail actions now open the existing authorized drawer and close back to their originating worklists.
Site Dashboard top-risk student detail actions now open the existing authorized drawer inside the dashboard context and close back to Site Dashboard.
Operations Program Breakdown rows now open scoped Operations readiness rows with the existing programId filter and shareable URL state.
Student home and Archive tab now turn own-student archive readiness checks into clear next-step guidance without adding fake request actions.
Student home now shows latest teacher feedback from review rows already scoped to the student's own submissions, without staff-only comments or fake links.
Student Submitted Work rows now repeat the latest matching teacher feedback from the existing student-scoped dashboard payload.
Operations Presentation Pending and Archive Failed summary tiles now open existing scoped Operations filters with shareable URL state.
Operations readiness now supports scoped category filters and Next Actions category drill-downs with shareable URL state.
Operations Needs Attention now opens a scoped needsAttention=true worklist filter with shareable URL state.
Operations Outline Pending now opens a scoped outlineAttention=true worklist filter with shareable URL state.

Review history now hides staff-only comments from student and assigned-mentor readers while preserving staff-visible history; student feedback copy now presents the bounded review list as Feedback History.
Student Feedback History rows now show the matching submission version and current status from the existing own-student dashboard payload.
Student Feedback History rows now open a real student-safe submission timeline from the already filtered review-history route.
Student dashboard now shows a scoped Your Required Work checklist from existing requirement, progress, and submission records.
Student dashboard requirement checklist rows are now grouped by project phase with per-phase complete and remaining counts.
Student next steps and requirement checklist rows now show persisted deadline labels/dates from existing requirement deadline records.
Student requirement checklist rows now show student-safe requirement descriptions and one quality nudge from existing requirement/quality-check records.

Student requirement checklist rows now expose real actions: focus existing evidence forms when evidence is missing, or send the existing draft/revision submission for teacher review when evidence is attached.
Student requirement checklist rows now open an in-page detail disclosure with status, due date, evidence count, submitted version, progress state, next action, and latest matching teacher feedback.
Operations Evidence Missing now opens scoped category=evidence and readiness=missing worklist rows with shareable URL state.
Viewer and shared read-only worklist language now clearly separates monitoring context from authorized staff actions without adding mutation controls.
Program Teacher dashboard now uses assigned-program/cohort language instead of source-record and role-scope wording.
Shared workspace access chips and related list/detail/review states now use assignment labels instead of raw scope ids or role-scope wording.
Review Queue empty, history, and disabled-decision states now use matching-work, true no-data, protected-history, and assigned-review-staff language.
Review Queue selected submissions now show student-visible, staff-only, and protected comment visibility counts while keeping note bodies out of the panel.
Operations presentation, archive, and attention panes now distinguish active-filter no-matches from true no-data without row jargon or fake actions.
Mentor Dashboard assigned-student rows now show meeting, presentation, outline, evidence, and next-step context from existing scoped route fields.
Mentor Assignments empty states now use student coverage language for filtered no-matches and true no-data instead of row jargon.
Mentor Dashboard assigned-student rows now render attention-needed students before on-track students using existing scoped attention/status fields.
Authorized student detail now shows limited mentor coverage history from existing assignment rows, with assigner names hidden from mentor-support detail.
Mentor Dashboard assigned-student rows now open existing authorized student detail on the Mentor tab for scoped meeting history.

Authorized student detail Mentor Meeting rows now show linked requirement title, submission version, and submission status from existing meeting/submission records without rendering raw submission IDs in the Mentor tab.
Authorized student detail now lets actively assigned mentors record held, missed, or make-up-required meetings through the existing mentor meetings endpoint.
Mentor meeting writes now reject optional linked submissions that do not belong to the selected student.
Public app-preview is now framed as Workspace Workflow with signed-in workspace boundaries instead of stale future-app/backend-ready implementation language.
Functionality language verifier now blocks stale public app-preview phrases in source and generated output.
Public guide home now exposes a visible route map for required student and teacher content across existing public pages, with source-test and generated-output coverage.
Public support pages now pair student first moves with visible teacher and mentor checkpoint actions from existing source-guide content.
Public phase pages now show visible teacher/mentor support checks from existing phase adult-role, evidence, and check-in-question data.
Public templates, portfolio, rubrics, and grades pages now pair student proof actions with visible teacher and mentor responsibility checks.
Program Teacher dashboard Submitted and Needs Revision metrics now open the existing scoped Review Queue status filters.
Site Dashboard presentation/archive snapshot rows now open exact scoped Operations filters for supported statuses while unsupported raw statuses remain summary-only.
Operations Check-In Needed now opens the existing scoped presentationStatus=attention_required worklist for checked-out presentations needing follow-up.
Operations Stale Activity now opens the existing scoped risk=stale worklist for students with no recent progress.
Operations Archive In Progress now opens a scoped archiveStatus=in_progress worklist for queued or running archive packages.
Operations Archive Expiring Soon and Archive Expired now open scoped archiveStatus=expiring_soon and archiveStatus=expired worklists for archive download-window follow-up.
Operations archive rows now render school-facing storage status labels instead of raw archive provider status values such as drive_config_missing.
Review Queue High Risk now opens the existing scoped risk=high worklist with URL state.
Review Queue Stale Activity now opens the existing scoped risk=stale worklist with URL state.
Review Queue Missing Mentor now opens the existing scoped risk=no_mentor worklist with URL state.

deferredWorkOrders.reason: Browser screenshot QA needs credentialed local runtime and multiple-site demo data.
Review Queue and Student Directory exact missing/evidence filters remain unsupported; Operations evidence-missing worklist filtering is complete.
missing, evidenceStatus, mentorUserId, studentUserId, and studentId are not emitted as Review Queue filters until a full scoped backend/UI/privacy path exists.
All-sites rollup needs backend aggregate and authorization design; this sprint intentionally avoided fake cross-site controls.
The first safe in-page action path now exists; a deeper requirement detail/draft form still needs product and write-path design beyond existing evidence and submit endpoints.

nextRecommendedWorkOrders.summary: Inspect whether Review Queue evidence-attached should remain summary-only or gain an exact privacy-safe filter.
Add hosted section-level permission-denied browser proof when credentialed runtime is available.
Run desktop/mobile browser QA for public route panels and guide-mode layout when runtime is available.
Add a Review Queue missing-evidence filter only after backend support and privacy tests exist.

doNotRepeat: Do not repeat protected workspace header/posture chip cleanup unless new leaked phrases are found.

Do not relink the Site Dashboard No Mentor metric back to Mentor Assignments only; it now opens the Student Directory with noMentor=true so staff see the actual missing-mentor students before assignment actions.
Do not repeat public preview implementation-language cleanup unless the verifier reports a new public review-only leak.
Do not re-clean public app-preview Future App Workflow/backend-ready/preview-data/source-count/audit-sensitive wording unless regression evidence appears.
Do not spend a run on generic docs churn when a concrete ladder work order is safe and testable.
Do not replace the functionality UX growth system with a short generic checklist; preserve ladder, ledger, state, scoring, and handoff requirements.
Do not add fake site switching, fake all-sites rollups, fake retry buttons, fake intervention workflows, or links to routes that do not exist.
Do not broaden viewer, teacher, mentor, or student access while adding dashboard drill-downs or student detail entry points.
Do not relink Program Breakdown rows to Student Directory; the program preset is complete.
Do not relink Mentor Coverage rows to Mentor Assignments; the mentor-workload preset is complete.
Do not re-add Review Queue URL-state support; extend it only when a newly supported filter has backend, UI, tests, and verifier coverage.
Do not emit Review Queue missing/evidence/mentor/student query params until full scoped support exists.
Do not rebuild Student Directory, Mentor Assignments, or Operations URL-state unless adding a newly supported filter.
Do not reintroduce retired builder cadence checks.
Do not re-add the student detail latest feedback summary; extend it only if the authorized detail API adds a new visible feedback source.
Do not re-add Site Dashboard Status Breakdown status-filter actions; extend only if new dashboard status values gain a supported Student Directory mapping.
Do not re-add Program Teacher dashboard scoped-student detail buttons unless a regression removes the existing View detail action.
Do not re-add Operations detail source preservation; Operations row details now open and close inside Operations.
Do not re-add Mentor Dashboard assigned-student detail buttons; Mentor Dashboard rows now open and close inside that dashboard context.
Do not re-add Review Queue detail source preservation; Review Queue student-detail actions now open and close inside the Review Queue.
Do not re-add Program Teacher Dashboard or Mentor Assignments detail source preservation; both now open and close inside their originating worklists.
Do not re-add Site Dashboard top-risk detail source preservation; top-risk rows now open and close inside Site Dashboard with current-site detail scope.
Do not re-add Operations Program Breakdown programId filtering; Operations program rows now open the scoped worklist with shareable URL state.
Do not re-add student archive blocked guidance; extend it only if the archive readiness API adds a new student-safe status or action.
Do not re-add the student home Latest Feedback panel; extend it only into a deeper feedback history after comment visibility and route shape are proven.
Do not re-add student Submitted Work feedback context; extend only if a dedicated student-safe feedback history or new feedback source is proven.
Do not re-add Operations Presentation Pending or Archive Failed metric filter actions; extend only when another Operations metric has an exact supported route filter.
Do not re-add Operations category filtering or Next Actions category drill-downs; extend only if the route adds a new safe category or exact next-action filter.
Do not re-add Operations Needs Attention filtering; extend only if a regression removes needsAttention=true or a new exact attention subtype is added by the route.
Do not re-add Operations Outline Pending filtering; extend only if a regression removes outlineAttention=true or a new exact outline subtype is added by the route.
Do not re-add the review-history staff-only comment filter; extend only if a new comment visibility value or feedback source is added.
Do not re-add student Feedback History version/status context; extend next with a full student-safe timeline only if the review-history route UI shape is proven.
Do not re-add the student Feedback History timeline action; extend only if students need compare/filter controls or new route-backed timeline fields.
Do not re-add the student requirement checklist panel; extend next only with a guided requirement detail/form or deeper phase page backed by real route data.
Do not re-add student requirement phase grouping; extend only with a real requirement detail/form, due-date detail, or deeper phase page backed by existing route data.
Do not re-add student requirement deadline labels; extend only with a real requirement detail/form or richer due-date timeline backed by existing deadlines.
Do not re-add student requirement descriptions or quality nudges; extend next only with a real guided requirement form or additional persisted guidance fields.
Do not re-add student requirement send-for-review actions; extend only with a deeper requirement detail drawer or a new route-backed student workflow.
Do not re-add the student requirement detail disclosure; extend only if a new persisted requirement, evidence, submission, or feedback field adds useful student context.
Do not re-add Operations Evidence Missing filtering; it now uses category=evidence and readiness=missing with route/UI/verifier coverage.
Do not rework the Viewer/read-only workspace and worklist language unless a regression reintroduces role or scope, Assignment action, Assignment form unavailable, or unclear action ownership.
Do not re-clean Program Teacher Source record counts, Scoped Student Progress, Visible in this role scope, assigned scope, or Scoped dashboard unavailable language unless regression evidence appears.
Do not re-clean shared workspace access chips for raw site/program/global scope ids; assignment labels and verifier coverage now guard that cluster.
Do not re-clean Review Queue empty/history/disabled-decision phrases unless regression evidence appears; the verifier now blocks the removed stale wording.
Do not re-add vague protected-comments-available copy in Review Queue selected-submission history; visibility-count labels now guard the boundary.
Do not re-clean Operations No presentation/archive/attention rows match phrases; filter-aware work/no-data copy and verifier coverage now guard that cluster.
Do not re-add the Mentor Dashboard assigned-student signal grid or next-step copy unless regression evidence appears.
Do not re-clean Mentor Assignments `No missing mentor rows match`; filter-aware student coverage language and verifier coverage now guard that cluster.
Do not broaden mentor assignment permissions while improving Mentor Assignments copy.
Do not re-add Mentor Dashboard attention-first ordering unless regression evidence appears.
Do not re-add mentor assignment history to student detail unless regression removes mentorAssignmentHistory or the Mentor Coverage History panel.
Do not re-add the Mentor Dashboard meeting-history action unless regression removes data-mentor-dashboard-action="open-meetings" or the Mentor-tab target behavior.
Do not re-add linked-work context to student-detail Mentor Meeting rows unless regression removes submissionTitle or Linked work rendering.
Do not re-add the mentor meeting record form unless regression removes data-mentor-meeting-form="true" or submitMentorMeeting().
Do not re-add the mentor meeting linked-submission scope guard unless regression removes submission_scope_denied coverage from /api/mentor/meetings.
Do not re-add the public no-hidden-core-content route map unless regression removes data-no-hidden-core-content or Required Content Has A Visible Path from app.js/public-companion app output.
Do not re-add public support-page teacher/mentor checkpoint panels unless regression removes data-resource-teacher-support or How Adults Can Support This Page from app.js/public-companion output.
Do not re-add public phase-page teacher/mentor support checks unless regression removes data-phase-teacher-support or How Adults Can Support This Step from source/generated output.
Do not re-add public template/portfolio/rubric/grade responsibility panels unless regression removes data-public-page-responsibilities or the remaining-page responsibility test.

Do not re-add Program Teacher dashboard Submitted/Needs Revision Review Queue presets unless regression removes preset: "submitted" or preset: "revision-requested" from renderProgramTeacherDashboardSection().
Do not re-add Site Dashboard snapshot-row Operations filters unless regression removes presentation-snapshot/archive-snapshot handling or the exact-status summary-only guard.
Do not re-add the Operations Check-In Needed metric unless regression removes the presentation-attention preset or presentationStatus=attention_required route proof.
Do not re-add the Operations Stale Activity metric unless regression removes the stale-activity preset or risk=stale route proof.
Do not re-add the Operations Archive In Progress metric unless regression removes the archive-in-progress preset or archiveStatus=in_progress queued/running route proof.

Do not re-add the Operations Archive Expiring Soon or Archive Expired metrics unless regression removes the archive-expiring-soon/archive-expired presets or archiveStatus=expiring_soon/archiveStatus=expired route proof.
Do not re-clean Operations archive provider-status rendering unless regression reintroduces raw values like drive_config_missing in archive worklist rows.
Do not re-add the Review Queue High Risk metric action unless regression removes the high-risk preset or risk=high Review Queue URL proof.
Do not re-add the Review Queue Stale Activity metric action unless regression removes the stale-review preset or risk=stale Review Queue URL proof.
Do not re-add the Review Queue Missing Mentor metric action unless regression removes the missing-mentor-review preset, summary.noMentor, or risk=no_mentor Review Queue URL proof.

lastValidationStatus.notes: Full validation passed for the Review Queue Missing Mentor metric filter. git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings. This run changes scoped review-queue summary/navigation, verifiers, focused route/UI coverage, and run records only; it does not change auth role grants, tenant/site/program/student privacy boundaries, migrations, secrets/env files, Cloudflare/OAuth/domain config, deploy settings, or live data.
